title: Antimicrobial resistance surveillance gaps
description: Many regions lack lab capacity to track resistant strains; treatment guidelines lag behind local resistance profiles.

title: Vaccine cold chain in tropical regions
description: Intermittent power and transport breakdowns spoil temperature-sensitive vaccines before they reach rural clinics.

title: Mental health provider shortage
description: Psychiatrist-to-population ratios in underserved areas mean long waits and crisis-only care.

title: Disease outbreak early warning
description: Syndromic data from clinics is not shared across borders fast enough to contain cross-border spread.

title: Maternal health referral delays
description: High-risk pregnancies lack timely referral to tertiary centers; ambulances and communication are inconsistent.

title: Diagnostic imaging access
description: Small hospitals cannot afford MRI/CT; patients travel far for scans, delaying cancer and stroke care.

title: Chronic disease self-management
description: Patients with diabetes and hypertension lack coaching and affordable devices to monitor at home.

title: Health worker burnout
description: Post-crisis staffing shortages increase overtime and errors; retention incentives are misaligned.

title: Clean water and ward infections
description: Limited sterile water in some facilities raises surgical site infection risk despite skilled staff.

title: Rare disease diagnosis latency
description: Patients wait years for genetic testing and specialist consensus; orphan drug pathways are unclear.

title: Substance use disorder treatment access
description: Evidence-based medication programs are scarce; stigma blocks insurance parity.

title: Ageing population and home care
description: Growing elderly cohorts need coordinated home nursing and fall prevention; family caregivers are exhausted.

title: Snakebite and neglected tropical diseases
description: Antivenom stockouts and weak referral networks lead to preventable deaths in rural tropics.

title: Air quality and respiratory burden
description: Urban air pollution drives asthma and COPD exacerbations; real-time exposure data is not actionable for patients.

title: Clinical trial diversity
description: Trial cohorts under-represent minorities; efficacy and dosing for broad populations remain uncertain.
